ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the tweet (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the tweet (e.g., spam, not spam) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet (e.g., @username) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags in the tweet (e.g., #bitcoin) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the news article was published */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories of the news article (e.g., finance, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_data" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency in BTC */,
  "volume_dollar" REAL /* Volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the analysis (e.g., bullish, bearish, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis (e.g., high, low) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for the analysis (e.g., LSTM, CNN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "price" REAL /* Predicted price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES exchange_data ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly detection result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the anomaly was detected */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., price spike, volume anomaly) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_detection_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES exchange_data ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message content of the log entry */,
  "log_code" TEXT /* Log code (e.g., error code, status code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., LSTM, CNN) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "price" REAL /* Predicted price of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly detection result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that detected the anomaly */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the anomaly was detected */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., price spike, volume anomaly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_anomaly_detection_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
